ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "project_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "project_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager responsible for the project */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Current status of the project */,
  "project_budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "project_actual_cost" TEXT /* Actual cost incurred for the project */,
  "project_client" TEXT /* Client for the project */,
  "project_priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sprints" (
  "sprint_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sprint */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the sprint belongs to */,
  "sprint_name" TEXT /* Name of the sprint */,
  "total_story_points" INTEGER /* Total story points planned for the sprint */,
  "sprint_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the sprint in days */,
  "sprint_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the sprint */,
  "sprint_end_date_planned" TEXT /* Planned end date of the sprint */,
  "sprint_end_date_actual" TEXT /* Actual end date of the sprint */,
  "sprint_goal" TEXT /* Goal or objective of the sprint */,
  "sprint_status" TEXT /* Current status of the sprint */,
  "sprint_actual_start_date" TEXT /* Actual start date of the sprint */,
  "sprint_description" TEXT /* Description of the sprint */,
  "sprint_lead_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sprint lead responsible for the sprint */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sprint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sprints_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sprints_sprint_lead_id FOREIGN KEY ("sprint_lead_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task */,
  "sprint_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sprint the task belongs to */,
  "task_name" TEXT /* Name of the task */,
  "story_points" INTEGER /* Story points assigned to the task */,
  "task_status" TEXT /* Status of the task (e.g., To Do, In Progress, Done) */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to the task */,
  "task_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the task */,
  "task_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the task */,
  "task_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the task */,
  "task_type" TEXT /* Type of the task (e.g., Feature, Bug Fix, Refactoring) */,
  "task_priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the task */,
  "task_estimated_hours" TEXT /* Estimated hours for the task */,
  "task_actual_hours" TEXT /* Actual hours spent on the task */,
  "task_created_date" TEXT /* Date the task was created */,
  "task_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the task was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_sprint_id FOREIGN KEY ("sprint_id") REFERENCES sprints ("sprint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, project manager, admin) */,
  "user_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Current status of the user (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "user_created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "user_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sprint_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "sprint_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sprint the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., Velocity, Sprint Burndown) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date the metric was recorded */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of the metric (e.g., Velocity, Burndown) */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the metric */,
  "metric_source" TEXT /* Source of the metric data (e.g., Manual, Automated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sprint_metrics_sprint_id FOREIGN KEY ("sprint_id") REFERENCES sprints ("sprint_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task the comment is related to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "comment_type" TEXT /* Type of the comment (e.g., Task Update, Sprint Update) */,
  "comment_status" TEXT /* Status of the comment (e.g., Active, Resolved) */,
  "comment_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sprint_releases" (
  "release_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each release */,
  "sprint_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sprint the release belongs to */,
  "release_version" TEXT /* Version number of the release */,
  "release_date_planned" TEXT /* Planned release date */,
  "release_date_actual" TEXT /* Actual release date */,
  "release_status" TEXT /* Status of the release (e.g., Planned, Released, Delayed) */,
  "release_notes" TEXT /* Detailed notes or changes made in the release */,
  "release_url" TEXT /* URL link to the release documentation or build */,
  "release_environment" TEXT /* Environment where the release was deployed (e.g., Development, Staging, Production) */,
  "release_approver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the release */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("release_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sprint_releases_release_approver_id FOREIGN KEY ("release_approver_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sprint_releases_sprint_id FOREIGN KEY ("sprint_id") REFERENCES sprints ("sprint_id")
)
